title: 10x 10k PBMC from a healthy donor, 3-prime v3.1
question: Metadata-only BMAT public benchmark smoke for 10x PBMC 10k v3.1 GEX provenance.
limitations: Metadata-only smoke. Raw matrices, marker sanity checks, and annotation validation must be run separately before scientific claims.
scope_note: Official 10x PBMC benchmark source used to verify tenx-gex manifest provenance without raw data download.

manifest_overlay.sample_sheet: public metadata only: 10x PBMC 10k v3.1 dataset page

assay_metadata.annotation_release: 10x Cell Ranger reference; lock exact refdata before raw rerun

biological_unit_policy.pseudobulk_policy: No cross-donor DE from a single-donor smoke. Use donor/sample-aware pseudobulk when comparing samples.
biological_unit_policy.cell_level_tests_limited_to: QC, annotation support, and marker sanity only

manifest_overlay.contrast_or_endpoint: QC and annotation sanity smoke; no condition contrast
software_versions: Cell Ranger version from official dataset page

qc_decisions.cell_calling_method: Cell Ranger filtered matrix metadata lock
qc_decisions.ambient_rna_method: not-run in metadata smoke; require method before marker claims
qc_decisions.doublet_method: not-run in metadata smoke; require method before state claims
qc_decisions.empty_droplet_method: Cell Ranger cell calling metadata; raw emptyDrops check not run

generated_artifacts.web_summary_html: official 10x dataset page web summary/download surface
generated_artifacts.filtered_feature_bc_matrix: official 10x filtered feature barcode matrix download surface
generated_artifacts.raw_feature_bc_matrix: official 10x raw feature barcode matrix download surface

title: Healthy donor PBMC 10x scRNA-seq GEO series
question: Metadata-only BMAT public benchmark smoke for GEO GSE115189 Cell Ranger-preprocessed PBMC 10x scRNA-seq.
limitations: Single healthy donor PBMC record. Smoke locks accession and preprocessing provenance only; it must not support cross-donor DE claims.
scope_note: GEO PBMC 10x series used to verify accession lock, processed-data provenance, and single-donor limitation wording.

manifest_overlay.sample_sheet: public metadata only: GEO GSE115189 series and sample records

assay_metadata.genome_build: GRCh38-or-submitters-reference; lock exact Cell Ranger reference before raw rerun
assay_metadata.annotation_release: GEO/Cell Ranger processed-data metadata; lock before analysis
assay_metadata.cellranger_version: Cell Ranger preprocessing reported by GEO; exact version lock required

biological_unit_policy.pseudobulk_policy: Single-donor record cannot support donor-aware condition DE; cell-level tests remain descriptive.

manifest_overlay.contrast_or_endpoint: processed-data parsing and annotation sanity; no condition contrast
software_versions: Cell Ranger version must be locked from GEO/SRA files before analysis

qc_decisions.cell_calling_method: Cell Ranger-preprocessed GEO data; raw cell-calling audit not run

generated_artifacts.web_summary_html: GEO/submitter processed-data metadata; web summary file must be locked if available
generated_artifacts.filtered_feature_bc_matrix: GEO processed matrix accession/file lock required

title: Parse versus 10x PBMC benchmark GEO series
question: Metadata-only BMAT public benchmark smoke for GEO GSE246624 platform-comparison PBMC provenance and platform caveats.
limitations: Platform benchmark smoke only. Parse and 10x data must not be interpreted as directly exchangeable without platform/batch modeling.
scope_note: GEO PBMC platform benchmark used to verify platform-effect caveats and donor-aware comparison requirements.

manifest_overlay.sample_sheet: public metadata only: GEO GSE246624 donor/platform metadata

assay_metadata.genome_build: GRCh38-or-submitters-reference; lock exact references separately for Parse and 10x
assay_metadata.chemistry: 10x 3-prime v3.1 plus Parse Evercode benchmark context
assay_metadata.cellranger_version: 10x arm version lock required before raw rerun

biological_unit_policy.pseudobulk_policy: Compare donors with platform as an explicit factor; never pool cells across platforms as independent replicates.
biological_unit_policy.cell_level_tests_limited_to: within-platform QC and annotation support only

manifest_overlay.contrast_or_endpoint: platform comparison smoke; no biological DE claim
software_versions: platform-specific pipelines must be locked before analysis

qc_decisions.cell_calling_method: platform-specific cell calling; raw audit not run
qc_decisions.batch_integration_method: platform effect must be modeled explicitly

de_strategy.cross_sample_method: donor-aware pseudobulk with platform covariate before any biological interpretation
de_strategy.multiplicity_method: FDR required when DE is run

review_status.provenance_review: GEO accession and platform caveat locked

title: OCCC and CAF CellPlex single-cell co-culture GEO series
question: Metadata-only BMAT public benchmark smoke for GEO GSE224333 CellPlex co-culture provenance and causal-overclaim boundaries.
limitations: Co-culture CellPlex smoke only. Cell-cell communication or causal mechanism claims require perturbation or orthogonal validation.
scope_note: GEO OCCC/CAF CellPlex source used to verify multiplex mapping and co-culture overclaim boundaries.

manifest_overlay.sample_sheet: public metadata only: GEO GSE224333 CellPlex sample metadata

assay_metadata.genome_build: GRCh38-or-submitters-reference; lock exact Cell Ranger reference before raw rerun
assay_metadata.sample_barcode_mapping_ref: GEO GSE224333 CellPlex sample metadata lock required

biological_unit_policy.pseudobulk_policy: Use sample/culture replicate-aware aggregation; co-culture cell-level contrasts are descriptive unless replicated.
biological_unit_policy.cell_level_tests_limited_to: annotation, QC, and descriptive co-culture patterns only

manifest_overlay.contrast_or_endpoint: monoculture versus co-culture descriptive smoke; no causal mechanism claim
software_versions: Cell Ranger multi version must be locked before analysis

qc_decisions.cell_calling_method: Cell Ranger/CellPlex metadata; raw cell-calling audit not run
qc_decisions.doublet_method: CellPlex multiplet policy required before claims

de_strategy.cross_sample_method: sample-aware pseudobulk required before condition DE
de_strategy.multiplicity_method: FDR required when DE is run

generated_artifacts.web_summary_html: Cell Ranger multi web summary lock required
generated_artifacts.sample_barcode_mapping: CellPlex sample barcode mapping lock required

review_status.provenance_review: GEO accession and CellPlex mapping requirement locked

title: Mouse GE-SCJ CellPlex developmental single-cell GEO series
question: Metadata-only BMAT public benchmark smoke for GEO GSE227412 mouse GE-SCJ developmental CellPlex provenance and tissue/timepoint boundaries.
limitations: Developmental mouse CellPlex smoke only. Tissue and timepoint effects must be kept separate from cell-intrinsic mechanism claims.
scope_note: GEO GE-SCJ development source used to verify mouse organism lock, tissue/timepoint metadata, and CellPlex multiplex caveats.

manifest_overlay.sample_sheet: public metadata only: GEO GSE227412 tissue/timepoint/sample metadata

assay_metadata.genome_build: GRCm38-or-submitters-reference; lock exact reference before raw rerun
assay_metadata.chemistry: 10x single-cell with CellPlex/CMO metadata lock required
assay_metadata.sample_barcode_mapping_ref: GEO GSE227412 sample/timepoint barcode mapping lock required

biological_unit_policy.pseudobulk_policy: Model tissue and timepoint explicitly; do not treat cells as independent biological replicates.
biological_unit_policy.cell_level_tests_limited_to: developmental annotation support and QC only

manifest_overlay.contrast_or_endpoint: GE-SCJ developmental metadata smoke; no causal fibroblast-epithelial mechanism claim
software_versions: Cell Ranger multi version must be locked before analysis

qc_decisions.cell_calling_method: Cell Ranger/CellPlex metadata; raw cell-calling audit not run
qc_decisions.doublet_method: CellPlex multiplet policy required before claims
qc_decisions.batch_integration_method: tissue/timepoint effects must be modeled explicitly

de_strategy.multiplicity_method: FDR required when DE is run

generated_artifacts.web_summary_html: Cell Ranger multi web summary lock required
generated_artifacts.sample_barcode_mapping: CellPlex/CMO sample barcode mapping lock required

review_status.provenance_review: GEO accession and developmental metadata lock enforced

title: Multiple myeloma versus control MSC bulk RNA-seq GEO series
question: Metadata-only BMAT public benchmark smoke for GEO GSE196297 bulk RNA-seq design, biological unit, and SRA/processed-data provenance.
limitations: Bulk metadata smoke only. No DEG claim is allowed until count provenance, design formula, rank check, covariates, effect sizes, and FDR are locked.
scope_note: GEO bulk RNA-seq source used to verify design/contrast lock and small-n caution without raw data download.

manifest_overlay.sample_sheet: public metadata only: GEO GSE196297 series matrix and SRA metadata

assay_metadata.genome_build: GRCh38-or-submitters-reference; lock exact reference before reanalysis
assay_metadata.quantifier: submitter pipeline or raw SRA re-quantification must be specified before DE
assay_metadata.transcriptome_reference: lock exact transcriptome/reference before raw or transcript-level reanalysis
assay_metadata.tx_to_gene_method: tximport/tximeta or count-import provenance required before DE
assay_metadata.read_layout: 100 bp paired-end sequencing reported by GEO series metadata

biological_unit_policy.pseudobulk_policy: Bulk RNA-seq uses donor/patient sample as biological unit; no cell-level replication issue.

manifest_overlay.contrast_or_endpoint: MM-MSC versus control MSC design lock smoke; no DEG claim in smoke
software_versions: DESeq2/edgeR/limma versions must be locked before DE

qc_decisions.fastq_qc: raw SRA FastQC/MultiQC not run in metadata smoke

de_strategy.cross_sample_method: bulk count model with patient/control donor as biological unit
de_strategy.design_formula: ~ disease_status plus justified covariates after metadata lock
de_strategy.effect_size_report: log2 fold change with uncertainty required

generated_artifacts.count_matrix: GEO processed counts/SRA re-quantification lock required
generated_artifacts.design_matrix: metadata-derived design matrix required before DE
